title.zh: 面向低碳城市的能源-环境智能决策方法
title.en: AI-Enabled Energy-Environment Decision Support for Low-Carbon Cities

sponsor.zh: 国家级/省部级科研项目模板
sponsor.en: National or provincial research grant template

summary.zh: 构建城市尺度能源与环境数据融合、预测和优化方法，服务低碳规划与精细化治理。
summary.en: Developing urban-scale data fusion, forecasting and optimization methods for low-carbon planning and fine-grained governance.

title.zh: 新能源消纳与综合能源系统协同优化
title.en: Co-Optimization of Renewable Integration and Integrated Energy Systems

summary.zh: 研究多能互补、储能配置与需求响应策略，提升可再生能源利用效率。
summary.en: Studying multi-energy complementarity, storage planning and demand response to improve renewable energy utilization.
